step_rationale: Platelet α-granule release marker; direct platelet activation indicator.
mechanism: β-Thromboglobulin is released during platelet activation and aggregation, marking the initiation of thrombotic cascade in acute MI.

references.title: Plasma markers of platelet and polymorphonuclear leukocyte activation in young adults with acute myocardial infarction.
Comparison of the effects of cellulose triacetate and polysulfone membrane on GPIIb/IIIa and platelet activation.
